title: struthanthus orbicularis
intro: Struthanthus orbicularis, also known as the discoid mistletoe or orbicular mistletoe, is a type of parasitic plant that grows on various tree species. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and exerting antioxidant effects. Struthanthus orbicularis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
